fixes_applied.original_issue: buildChildStats() and flattenVisible() called on every render without memoization
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Wrapped buildChildStats in useMemo([tasks]), topLevel filter in useMemo([tasks]), and flattenVisible result in useMemo([topLevel, childStatsMap, expandedIds, onAddSubtask]). Also extracted POINTER_ACTIVATION_CONSTRAINT to module-level constant.

fixes_applied.original_issue: taskCount in useEffect dependency array causes cascading API calls on every task mutation
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Removed taskCount variable and its usage from the useEffect dependency array. Projects, tags, and blocked task IDs now only fetch on mount and dataMutationCount changes.

fixes_applied.original_issue: 4 separate useMemo blocks each independently iterate state.tasks for badge counts
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Consolidated inboxTaskCount, todayTaskCount, projectTaskCounts, and projectCompletedCounts into a single useMemo that iterates state.tasks once and returns all derived values.

fixes_applied.original_issue: new Date() in defaultDueDate prop creates new object on every render
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Memoized defaultDueDate with useMemo([today]). Also memoized frogCandidates array for EatTheFrog prop with useMemo([overdueTasks, todayTasks]).

fixes_applied.original_issue: [...overdueTasks, ...todayTasks] spread creates new array on every render for EatTheFrog
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Replaced inline spread with memoized frogCandidates variable.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Two separate useEffect hooks duplicate status transition detection for animClass and showBurst
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Combined into a single useEffect that handles both setAnimClass and setShowBurst in one status transition check, eliminating duplicate logic.

fixes_applied.original_issue: getLast7Days() and getWeekStart() called on every render without memoization; maxCount computed inline
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Wrapped getWeekStart() and getLast7Days() in useMemo([today]). Wrapped maxCount in useMemo([dailyCounts]).

fixes_applied.original_issue: 3 separate tasks.filter() calls on every render without memoization
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Consolidated into a single useMemo that iterates tasks once and returns overdueCount, todayCount, and pendingCount.

fixes_applied.original_issue: extractTasksFromMessage() called during render without memoization
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Wrapped in useMemo(() => extractTasksFromMessage(message), [message]).

fixes_applied.original_issue: Inline IIFE in JSX runs filter on every render to count pending tasks
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Extracted to a memoized pendingCount variable with useMemo([inboxTasks]).

fixes_applied.original_issue: handleReschedule uses sequential for...of loop with await for overdue tasks
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Replaced sequential loop with Promise.all for parallel execution.

fixes_applied.original_issue: handleReschedule uses sequential for...of loop with await for overdue tasks
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Replaced sequential loop with Promise.all for parallel execution.

fixes_applied.original_issue: DraggableTaskCard not wrapped in React.memo, causing unnecessary re-renders during drag
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Wrapped DraggableTaskCard in React.memo.

fixes_applied.original_issue: DraggableCard not wrapped in React.memo, causing unnecessary re-renders during drag
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Wrapped DraggableCard in React.memo.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Completed view filter includes cancelled tasks (bug + perf issue)
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Changed filter to only include t.status === 'completed', removing the cancelled check.

fixes_applied.original_issue: handleToggle searches full tasks array instead of smaller quickWins array
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Changed tasks.find to quickWins.find for O(smaller-n) lookup.

fixes_applied.original_issue: handleFinish iterates estimates Map and calls onUpdateTask sequentially
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Collected update promises and used Promise.all for parallel execution.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Settings loaded by issuing ~52 parallel API calls on mount
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — requires backend endpoint change (GET /api/settings/all). Too risky for a pure frontend fix.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Requires adding a new batch settings API endpoint on the backend. Out of scope for a performance fix pass.

fixes_applied.original_issue: new Date(task.dueDate) < new Date() creates two Date objects per task per render
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — TaskItem is already wrapped in React.memo, so this only fires when task props change. The perf impact is minimal and a fix would require passing a pre-computed 'now' string through props or context.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: TaskItem is already React.memo'd, limiting re-renders. Adding a 'now' prop or context would increase API surface for marginal gain.

fixes_applied.original_issue: toLocaleDateString called during render for each overdue task without memoization
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Deferred — OverdueSection typically has few items and the component only re-renders when overdue tasks change. Marginal gain.
fixes_applied.reason_if_deferred: Low item count in practice. OverdueSection only re-renders when its tasks prop changes.

summary: Applied 17 performance fixes across 14 files. All 4 CRITICAL issues fixed: TaskList.tsx memoization (buildChildStats + flattenVisible), useAppState.ts cascading API calls removed (taskCount dep) and 4 useMemo blocks consolidated into single-pass, Today.tsx defaultDueDate memoized. 7 WARNING fixes applied: TaskItem.tsx duplicate useEffects merged, Stats.tsx memoization added, WelcomeScreen.tsx single-pass filter, MessageBubble.tsx memoized extraction, Inbox.tsx pending count memoized. 6 SUGGESTION fixes: React.memo on drag cards (Matrix + Board), Promise.all for batch operations (Today + Upcoming + DailyPlanningModal), Completed.tsx bug fix (cancelled tasks removed), DopamineMenu.tsx smaller search scope, sensor config extracted. 3 items deferred (SettingsContext batch endpoint, TaskItem Date objects, OverdueSection toLocaleDateString). All 2469 tests pass, typecheck clean.
